temporal_description: A close-up, shaky shot looks through a large, jagged hole in a white wall. The audio begins with a loud, violent, and echoing crash, as if a heavy object has forcefully broken through a wall. Through the opening, a dimly lit interior is visible, with a wooden door and a glimpse of a room in the background. A man with dark hair, wearing a dark jacket, suddenly appears in the hole, his face contorted in a snarl as he lunges forward. This is immediately followed by a man's sharp, terrified scream. The camera pulls back slightly, revealing more of the man as he recoils with a shocked and fearful expression, his mouth agape. The hole in the wall remains the central focus, with its rough, splintered edges framing the chaotic scene. The man then turns away from the hole and moves into the room, his back to the camera. The room is softly lit by a lamp on a nightstand. In the background, a set of French doors with glass panes is visible. The camera follows the man as he moves further into the room, his profile visible against the warm light of the lamp. The shot is still shaky, maintaining a sense of urgency and disarray. The sequence concludes with another loud, percussive thud, suggesting a continuation of the destructive action. There is no background music, making the raw, impactful sound effects the central focus of the audio.
